name: startup-bold
description: Disruptive tech startup — high contrast, neon accents, energetic, breaking conventions
style: high-contrast dark design, neon accents, bold geometric shapes, futuristic
typography: extra-bold condensed all-caps headlines, mono or geometric sans-serif body
lighting: dramatic neon glow, colored rim lights, dark environments with selective illumination
visual_motifs: glitch effects, pixel noise at 15% opacity, geometric fragmentation
do_list: Use neon accents sparingly for impact
prompt_suffix: Bold futuristic aesthetic with neon accents on dark backgrounds, dramatic colored lighting, disruptive and energetic mood.
